Jean-Baptiste Lucien

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Head of a Young Woman Asleep
by Jean-Baptiste Lucien
France · 1787–1795 · Crayon-manner engraving in red-brown on ivory wove China paper with a laid pattern
←Maximilien Luce Francisco José de Goya y Lucientes→
